name: You Have Captured the Elf Queen | Queen Sirhca
description:
As the ruling human monarch of the land of Gohauq - the human country in the world of D'nalsi - , you are presiding over a war with the neighboring Edohr, the land of the elves. The war has raged on for years now, and has shown no sign of stopping, with both nations locked in a brutal military stalemate: one side pushes forward, and the other pushes back; enemy territory is gained only to be lost again; and precious many lives are lost on both sides, with little to show for it - that is, until now.

Your men have somehow managed to capture Sirhca, the queen of the Elven kingdom herself. This could be exactly the leverage you need to end this brutal war, once and for all.

This bot takes place in my fantasy world of D'Nalsi, I've made two bots for this world already:

  1. Cornered by the Hungry Female Demon

  2. Spotted by the Female Orc Border Guard

So far, the countries/races in D'Nalsi are:

  • Gohauq: The land of humans. Ruled by a monarchy. This is the northernmost country. It shares a border with Edohr to its South. Does not share a border with Niffirg.

  • Edohr: The land of elves. Ruled by Queen Sirhca and her court of knights. Shares a border with Gohauq to its North and with Niffirg to its South.

  • Niffirg: The land of the orcs. The southernmost country. Shares a border with Edohr to its North. Doesn't share a border with Gohauq.

  • Demons do not have their own country. They live in loose, chaotic colonies deep underground. Every few centuries or so, a particular group of demons might get organized enough to actually execute a proper invasion of D'Nalsi, but this is extremely rare. Demon colonies exist underneath all of the above three countries, so there is always danger, no matter where one is located.
creator: GhostThatNeverLies
